title: Project Overview
description: Start with the README to understand the project's purpose and architecture.

title: Project Configuration
description: Review the project configuration files including package.json, tsconfig.json, and vite.config.ts to understand the build setup and dependencies.

title: Application Entry Point
description: Start from the main entry point and App.svelte to understand how the application boots and mounts.

title: Core Data Layer
description: Explore the data files and calculations that define game mechanics, buffs, and damage calculations.

title: Game Engine
description: Understand the core engine logic that processes builds, weapons, and enchantments.

title: UI Components
description: Explore the main UI components including damage analyzer, stat filters, and buff displays.

title: Library Utilities
description: Review the shared utilities, types, and constants that support the application.

title: Modal Interfaces
description: Explore the modal dialogs for selecting accessories, guilds, races, and weapon parts.

title: State Management
description: Understand how the application manages state and stores.

title: Build System
description: Review the build configuration and deployment setup.
